subject: A robed humanoid mage walking through a ring of immobilized Eldrazi spawn creatures, holding chains connected to a glowing blue orb
description: A humanoid figure — lightly armored, upright, commanding — strides forward through a circular arrangement of crouching Eldrazi spawn creatures. The figure holds two chains, one in each hand, both connected to a glowing blue magical orb floating near waist height. The Eldrazi creatures flank the figure on both sides, rendered in pinks and purples with spiny forms, crouched low as if held in place by the magic. Behind the figure, a luminous green-yellow glow lights the background, suggesting ruins or a structure covered in glowing script. The composition strongly codes as containment or binding — a figure in control of dangerous things.
foreground: humanoid mage holding chains attached to a glowing orb, flanked by crouching Eldrazi spawn
background: luminous green-yellow runic glow suggesting a structure or ruins
